title: NexusLib
description: A library mod used by Hecco's mods, featuring some useful helpers and systems
body:
![NexusLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2c900221e8399e3e12b5084a2c99d150623f3db.png) **NexusLib is a library mod that contains some useful functions, helpers, and systems utilized by my mods.**

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca3f4e65221d988a2fc589738b83a07cbc70f4c.png) #### - Registry helpers for Multiloader projcts #### - Public classes #### - Utility methods #### - Easily make families of blocks #### - Create recipe trees for the Stonecutter #### - Loader-agnostic tool action registry (stripping, tilling, pathing, etc) #### - Registry for removing tint from specific blocks' particles #### - Easily create compatibility with other mods with automatic disabling

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d19ba412bda8a984720e07198a5d80747eb737.png) Code Help - @Yirmiri, @Artyrian

![Other projects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41d3acdede04d56f5cdaafabbfe40363f5210c2c.png) [![Biomes of Bountiful Fares](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7a36bc40b4e96680b94f5482a87a4dbab8a4dd1_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-of-bountiful-fares) [![Bountiful Fares](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11c21a3553c18541e4aadad7927d438539155a7f.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares) [![appledog!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca7b844afe710794076d650c54fc0b16f9846da_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/appledog)

![Contact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c2068e77f264c50ff3a19d29073bc7f5909713.png) [![Discord logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/580b5f7f4f2d41ff0f6ee3e06caead00a6747e5d.png)](https://discord.com/invite/yrDsSeNkWu) [![Bluesky logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/439d1bf0de9cb55be3270cc1e1e2aa6149f9598e.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/hecco.bsky.social) [![Twitter / X logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b793cfc096e5677e0828de3aad077c729c8bc1.png)](https://x.com/Hecco) [![Kofi logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa2ff27fa029d3462e365929eef8f4f9e1f69405.png)](https://ko-fi.com/hecco) ## You can report bugs on [GitHub](https://github.com/Heccology/Bountiful-Fares/issues).
